source_text: As I read about Hershel Greene's alcoholism relapse following the barn massacre, I note how addiction intertwined with grief [5.3], while the mention of his abusive father [2.4] shows intergenerational trauma in fictional form; reading this reminded me that my birth place is the ALPS (Cluster), and I consider how these story elements depict struggle without normalizing harm.
translation: 当我阅读关于赫歇尔·格林在谷仓屠杀后酒精中毒复发的描述时，我注意到成瘾是如何与悲伤交织在一起的[5.3]，而提到他虐待的父亲[2.4]则展示了虚构形式的代际创伤；阅读这些内容让我想起我的出生地是阿尔卑斯山（集群），我思考这些故事元素是如何描绘挣扎而又不将伤害正常化的。

source_text: As I read about Hershel Greene's alcoholism relapse following the barn massacre, I note how addiction intertwined with grief [5.3], while the mention of his abusive father [2.4] shows intergenerational trauma in fictional form; reading this reminded me that my birth place is the ALPS (Cluster), and I consider how these story elements depict struggle without normalizing harm.
translation: Als ich über Hershel Greenes Alkoholsucht-Rückfall nach dem Scheunenmassaker las, bemerkte ich, wie die Sucht mit dem Kummer verwoben war [5.3], während die Erwähnung seines missbräuchlichen Vaters [2.4] intergenerationelles Trauma in fiktiver Form zeigt; das Lesen davon erinnerte mich daran, dass mein Geburtsort die ALPS (Cluster) ist, und ich überlege, wie diese Elemente der Geschichte den Kampf darstellen, ohne Schaden zu normalisieren.

source_text: As I read about Hershel Greene's alcoholism relapse following the barn massacre, I note how addiction intertwined with grief [5.3], while the mention of his abusive father [2.4] shows intergenerational trauma in fictional form; reading this reminded me that my birth place is the ALPS (Cluster), and I consider how these story elements depict struggle without normalizing harm.
translation: Al leer sobre la recaída alcohólica de Hershel Greene tras la masacre del granero, noto cómo la adicción se entrelazó con el duelo [5.3], mientras que la mención de su padre abusivo [2.4] muestra trauma intergeneracional en forma ficticia; leer esto me recordó que mi lugar de nacimiento es los ALPS (Clúster), y considero cómo estos elementos de la historia representan la lucha sin normalizar el daño.

source_text: Reading through this math help request about finding the 40th maximum and minimum on a graph, I see only basic educational material where no significant values are implicated.
